programmes.show_description: Pitch Imperfect: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter must regain his family's respect after making a humiliating throw during Oktoberfest, and Brian and Stewie become chiropractors.
Unzipped Code: Anarchic animated sitcom. Cleveland loses his job as a mail carrier because of a mishap, only to get a new and more successful job at the brewery where Peter works.
First Blood: The men go to a ranch in order to regain their sense of masculinity. Elsewhere, Stewie has an accident on a slide that leads him to think he's started having periods.
Jambalaya: US animated comedy series. Roger turns the Smiths' house into a restaurant that serves jambalaya, and Stan and Hayley go on a road trip to stalk a woman on Facebook.
You Are Here: US animated comedy series. Roger and Steve try to save a dying shopping mall, and Stan, Hayley, Klaus, and Francine start a food truck business.
The Cupid: Sitcom about three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. The boys get a dose of culture when Grumio is street-cast to play the part of Cupid in a play.
Tests: Sitcom set in a police training college. Geeta freaks out about the dreaded bleep test, Bob gets in touch with his inner Spider-Man, and Paul gets a final warning.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Maple Makeover: Canadian reality series. Steve and Tiffany help Lesley and her partner Jordan, who have been struggling to find a work-life balance at OMG Baked Goodness in Toronto.
Fashion entrepreneur Caz hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Will any of them shine?
Rinat, George and Ernest battle to win the affections of Annabelle from Leeds. Will any of the lad wow her with their fashion choices?
After an explosive trip to Barcelona, the Essex residents are back with a bang. Yaz escapes to her family home and admits to her problems with Lockie.
As Pete's new relationship with Shelby goes from strength to strength, his friends are concerned that he's isolating himself from the rest of the group.

programmes.show_name: Deal or No Deal for Soccer Aid
programmes.show_description: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special Soccer Aid for UNICEF edition as Alex Brooker steps up to take on the Banker and tries to score the jackpot for charity.

programmes.show_name: Deal or No Deal: Celebrity Special
programmes.show_description: Stephen Mulhern hosts as Olympic heptathlete Katarina Johnson-Thompson takes on the Banker and tries to be the first celebrity player to bag the jackpot.
Hilarious reality game show that sees a whole host of celebrities cause absolute chaos to win money for the unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows! Guz Khan guest stars.
Stephen Mangan, Kemi Rodgers and Tom Allen join Stephen Mulhern as they 'say what they see' and guess well-known phrases for a chance to win 50,000 pounds for their charities.
High-kicking animated adventure film featuring the voices of Jack Black and Dustin Hoffman, 2008. An overweight and clumsy panda is chosen as the protector of a valley of peace.

KSI takes part in Tu Strange's wonderfully wacky audition. Plus, schoolteacher Ben and his remarkable students inspire the audience with their uplifting original song.
Broad slapstick comedy film starring Jim Carrey, 1997. When a lawyer's son wishes for him to tell nothing but the truth for a day, the wish comes true and sets the lawyer free.

Hard Times at Adam West High: Anarchic animated sitcom. Chris tries to use Stewie's time machine to undo a dysfunction that occurs while he is giving a book report at school.
Jersey Bore: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter goes to a business conference in Atlantic City with Preston, and Stewie helps Chris prepare for a presentation of Romeo and Juliet.
Oscars Guy: Anarchic animated sitcom. Nearing the night of the Oscars, Peter decides to pay homage to three different Oscar-winning stories with the help of a roulette wheel.
Gernot and Strudel: US animated comedy series. The family recreate a television show to try to teach Klaus the value of sharing, and Steve has to stop Roger from doing drugs.
I Heard You Wanna Buy Some Speakers: US animated comedy series. When Barry's dad's speakers get destroyed accidentally, Snot forces Barry to get replacements from Roger.
The Crime Wave: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. The boys join a military fitness class to protect themselves amidst a crime wave in the city. Grumio starts dating a talented baker.

The World Needs S'More People Like You: Ooey-gooey, decadent competition series. The bakers embark on their first decadent chocolate Technique Test and reimagine the classic s'more.
Seaside Shack: The first episode of the American version of the competitive cookery series. The competitors are split into teams and must create a food shack on the beach.
Bachelor Pad Muskoka: House-hunting show. Jeff and his buying buddy Cara seek a Muskoka cottage with a boathouse, room for entertaining family and friends, and fantastic lake views.
Reality series. Sam has a work crisis, Billie finally gets a health diagnosis, the sisters go off grid and reveal the extent of some childhood traumas, and Sue gets a makeover.

Kenya Vs Ken: Cynthia and Mike's relationship is tested. The girls kick out their frustrations with a game of kickball. Marc invites Kenya's nemesis to a bowling game.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Housewarming History Lesson: US reality series. The divide between Teresa, Joe and Melissa is at a standstill as Frankie hits Dolores with some hard questions.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
The re-united camp face some extreme challenges. Two campmates face their ultimate fears as they are literally dropped from a great height.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the game show with Ashley Roberts, Tim Vine, and Mel Giedroyc competing to identify well-known phrases and win thousands for charity.
Now that Gemma and Arg are finally official, it appears that they might not be on the same page after all. Lockie and Yaz both vow to heal their relationship.
In the Name of Charity: Cynthia hosts a baby shower for Eva. Kenya helps her husband plan a charity event. Kandi does whatever it takes to win the role of a lifetime.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Driving Miss Crazy: US reality series. Danielle throws Valentina an over-the-top Barbie-themed birthday party, and Teresa and her daughters go wedding veil shopping.

Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.
...- The Killing of Charlie Cosser. Documentary series. This episode looks at the fatal stabbing of 17-year-old Charlie Cosser, a case that has drawn millions of views on TikTok.
Happy Holo-ween: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter creates a hologram of himself to get out of household duties on Halloween.
The Stewaway: Anarchic animated sitcom. Stewie winds up in Paris when after taking refuge in Quagmire's suitcase during a game of hide-and-seek, and Peter and Lois go to Vermont.
